metadata.name: Blink Design System
metadata.description: Complete design system for Blink dispatch management platform

usageGuide.description: This design system export is framework-agnostic and can be used in React, Angular, Vue, or any web framework.

tokens.description: Design tokens define primitive and semantic values for styling
tokens.usage: Each token has a 'value' (actual CSS value) and 'variable' (CSS variable name). Use values for direct implementation or variables for dynamic theming.

components.description: Component definitions include code examples, colors, and comprehensive style tokens

styleTokens.description: Each component's styleTokens object provides complete styling specifications
styleTokens.structure: Properties include both raw values (e.g., '8px') and CSS variable references (e.g., 'var(--spacing-2)')
styleTokens.usage: Use styleTokens to replicate exact component styling in any framework

statuses.description: Status badges include color, textColor, and brandColor for each status value
statuses.usage: Use color for background, textColor for text, and brandColor for reference to the brand palette

functional.name: Form Controls
functional.description: Input fields, selects, checkboxes and form elements

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary action button for main interactions

functional.name: Alerts & Notifications
functional.description: Alert boxes, dialogs, and notification toasts

functional.name: Data Display
functional.description: Tables, cards, badges, and data presentation components

components.name: Badge
components.description: Generic badge component for labels and counts

functional.name: Navigation
functional.description: Tabs, menus, breadcrumbs, and navigation controls

business.name: Status Badges
business.description: Business-specific status indicators for bookings, quotes, runs, items, and legs

components.name: Booking Status
components.description: Status indicators for bookings throughout their lifecycle

components.name: Quote Request Status
components.description: Status badges for quote requests (shipper creates these)

components.name: Quote Status (Carrier Response)
components.description: Status badges for individual carrier quotes (carrier responses to quote requests)

components.name: Item Status
components.description: Status indicators for individual items/vehicles (aggregated from leg statuses). Items do NOT have 'At Collection' or 'At Delivery' - only legs do.

components.name: Leg Status
components.description: Status badges for transport legs (journey segments: collection → delivery). Collected = In Transit.
